enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his day in Boulder on April 30, 2014, spending it working on his cycling website (a bike racer level page with strength-to-weight ratio calculators) while high on hashish. He discusses his cannabis use habits, watches Jesse Ventura and Young Turks videos, eats junk food, and riffs on 9/11 conspiracy theories he encountered in Ventura's content. He ends with a defense of weed as a motivation-focusing rather than motivation-killing substance.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Weed gives too much motivation to one thing, creating the illusion of killing motivation for everything else
Regular smokers get desensitized and are practically sober at work after a couple hours
Open to exotic conspiracy theories (directed energy weapons, HAARP) based on Ventura content, but not deeply committed
Genuinely excited and passionate; sees it as creative and rewarding work
Acknowledges eating too much junk food (Stouffer's lasagna, burritos) and wants to return to rice and canned vegetables
